summary: Fold F-004 detached daemon reset/operator lifecycle into mcp-host-session-process-sweep; a separate daemon reset packet would duplicate the same inventory, lineage, and dry-run cleanup control plane.
Final synthesis should explicitly downgrade P0 memory-first findings where measurements show fixed resident process costs or shallow cleanup risk, not successful-search leak growth.

Keep iteration 008 order: daemon correctness first, protocol/task lifecycle second, code-graph ownership and host sweep next, sidecar lifecycle next, then project/registry/adapter/read-path resident-memory work.
No unresolved blocker should prevent iteration 010 synthesis; remaining RSS, fallback, parent-PID, and DB-dir questions are implementation-packet verification gates.
